message:
feat(fp-columnar): add nunique/any/all/is_unique/has_duplicates/pct_change parity (frankenpandas-tuj4)

Six Column methods rounding out membership/reduction/rate surfaces:

- nunique() — count of distinct non-missing values via
  fp-types::nannunique (matches pd.Series.nunique(dropna=True)).
- any() / all() — boolean truthiness reductions via
  fp-types::nanany / nanall (skipna=True convention).
- is_unique / has_duplicates — pandas properties. has_duplicates
  short-circuits on first repeat seen; nulls are ignored for
  uniqueness (pandas semantic).
- pct_change(periods) — (cur - prev) / prev; negative periods look
  forward. Returns Null(NaN) on missing inputs, zero previous, or
  NaN intermediate. Result dtype is Float64.

Co-lands frankenpandas-fgiy (any/all), u80p (pct_change),
rd06 (is_unique/has_duplicates).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
